selected_question.question: Will automation displace more than 30% of current jobs in advanced economies by 2035 without net job creation in new sectors?
selected_question.why_it_matters: Guides workforce retraining, social safety net design, and economic policy reforms.

selected_score.rationale: Job displacement affects economies and social policy; uncertainty high; actionable for workforce planning; question is quantifiable and time-bound.

all_scores.rationale: Human-level AGI would transform society; timeline is uncertain; monitoring AI progress can guide policy; question is specific and testable within timeframe.
Decentralized internet impacts data control and security; adoption trends are uncertain; actionable for policy and tech development; question is measurable by 2030.
Geopolitical shifts affect global stability; outcomes uncertain; less directly actionable but important for strategy; question is definable and testable.
Automated citizen participation could transform governance; feasibility uncertain; actionable for democratic innovation; measurable by 2030.
Job displacement affects economies and social policy; uncertainty high; actionable for workforce planning; question is quantifiable and time-bound.
Pan-coronavirus vaccine critical for health security; scientific uncertainty remains; actionable for funding and research; testable by 2030.
Net-zero emissions vital for climate; feasibility uncertain; highly actionable for policy; measurable progress by 2050.
Immersive media could reshape culture; adoption uncertain; actionable for media industry; measurable by 2040.
